Comment: Alpha Engine Backtest+Eval pipeline (config#830) — standalone Step Function that runs ONLY Backtester (SSM → spot_backtest.sh --mode=param-sweep) → Evaluator (SSM → spot_backtest.sh --skip-stages=backtest,parity) → NotifyComplete, reusing the exact state definitions from the Saturday SF (alpha-engine-saturday-pipeline). Purpose: when only backtester or evaluator CODE changes, re-run those two stages off the existing weekly data/research/training artifacts WITHOUT the ~80 min of upstream pipeline (DataPhase1 + RAG + Research + DataPhase2 + PredictorTraining). AWS Step Functions only supports redrive from FAILED executions, so re-running unchanged-but-SUCCEEDED upstream stages was previously impossible from the Saturday SF — the stopgap was the local-blocking infrastructure/spot_backtest_and_evaluate.sh shell chain (crucible-backtester), which this SF replaces for orchestrated mid-week reruns. Trigger manually from the console/CLI; the script stays for local dev. Pass {"ec2_instance_id": ["i-..."]} (sns_topic_arn + run_date default in InitializeInput). Deliberately omits PredictorBacktest / parity / health-check / report-card / director — those belong to the full Saturday run.

InitializeInput.Comment: Layer defaults under the execution input so manual mid-week reruns only need to pass ec2_instance_id. Seeds sns_topic_arn (alerts topic), pipeline_label=' Backtest+Eval' (so HandleFailure surfaces 'Alpha Engine Backtest+Eval Pipeline — FAILED'), preflight_args='' (non-dry spot-command suffix, kept so the Backtester/Evaluator States.Format references resolve identically to the Saturday SF), and run_date=date($$.Execution.StartTime) so the Backtester and Evaluator stages key off ONE backtest/{date}/ S3 prefix (same single-date fix as the Saturday SF). User-passed values win via States.JsonMerge with the execution input as the last (highest-precedence) arg.

Backtester.Comment: Backtest SIMULATION-ONLY stage (10y simulate + param sweep) on spot instance, after predictor training. L4472 phase-split (2026-05-31, ROADMAP L4472): the monolithic Backtester state ran simulate+param_sweep+predictor-backtest+Phase4+optimizer/cov/gamma in ONE SSM command whose SUMMED runtime exceeded the SSM execution timeout on a fresh date (L4470). This state now runs ONLY the simulation pipeline via --mode=param-sweep; the predictor-backtest+Phase4 block runs in the new PredictorBacktest state and the optimizer/cov/gamma block in PortfolioOptimizerBacktest, each with its own SSM timeout + independent redrive. --no-pit-parity here so pit_parity runs exactly once (in PredictorBacktest, where it belongs). State name kept as Backtester (lower-churn — preserves DriftDetection's Next/Catch edges + skip_backtester gate semantics; skip_backtester still skips the whole backtest-family by routing past CheckSkipParity to CheckSkipEvaluator). Mirrors the 2026-05-07/05-16 simulate/parity/evaluator split precedent (plans evaluator-split-260507.md + preflight-task-split-260516.md). All states key off the same backtest/{date}/ S3 prefix. If this state fails, PredictorBacktest is NOT entered (preserves the 4/24 anti-auto-promote-garbage rule).

Parameters.commands.$: States.Array('set -eo pipefail','sudo -u ec2-user git -C /home/ec2-user/alpha-engine-backtester pull --ff-only origin main','cd /home/ec2-user/alpha-engine-backtester','export HOME=/home/ec2-user','set -a && source /home/ec2-user/.alpha-engine.env && set +a',States.Format('export RUN_DATE=\'{}\'',$.run_date),States.Format('/home/ec2-user/alpha-engine-dashboard/.venv/bin/python -m nousergon_lib.ssm_log_capture run --slug backtester --log /var/log/backtester.log -- bash infrastructure/spot_backtest.sh --mode=param-sweep --no-pit-parity --skip-stages=parity,evaluator{}',$.preflight_args))

Retry.Comment: Retry on failure/timeout — handles spot interruption (new instance on retry)

WaitForBacktester.Comment: Poll SSM command until backtester complete

ExtractBacktesterError.Comment: Normalize Backtester SSM non-Success poll into $.error.

CheckSkipEvaluator.Comment: Skip-gate. {"skip_evaluator": true} bypasses the Evaluator stage and routes straight to NotifyComplete (useful for a backtester-only mid-week rerun).

Evaluator.Comment: Evaluator on a separate spot instance (split from Backtester 2026-05-07 — plan: alpha-engine-docs/private/evaluator-split-260507.md). Reads s3://alpha-engine-research/backtest/{RUN_DATE}/ artifacts produced by the prior Backtester state and runs evaluate.py --mode all --upload, which sends the per-signal grading email and auto-applies optimizer configs. Reuses spot_backtest.sh with --skip-stages=backtest,parity; the script is the canonical dispatch surface (existing CSV vocabulary). Live-apply mode by default; for diagnostic-only off-cycle runs, invoke spot_backtest.sh manually with --freeze-evaluator and --skip-stages=backtest,parity.

Parameters.commands.$: States.Array('set -eo pipefail','sudo -u ec2-user git -C /home/ec2-user/alpha-engine-backtester pull --ff-only origin main','cd /home/ec2-user/alpha-engine-backtester','export HOME=/home/ec2-user','set -a && source /home/ec2-user/.alpha-engine.env && set +a',States.Format('export RUN_DATE=\'{}\'',$.run_date),States.Format('/home/ec2-user/alpha-engine-dashboard/.venv/bin/python -m nousergon_lib.ssm_log_capture run --slug evaluator --log /var/log/evaluator.log -- bash infrastructure/spot_backtest.sh --skip-stages=backtest,parity{}',$.preflight_args))

Retry.Comment: Retry on failure/timeout — handles spot interruption (new instance on retry). Mirrors Backtester retry posture for symmetry.

WaitForEvaluator.Comment: Poll SSM command until evaluator complete

ExtractEvaluatorError.Comment: Normalize Evaluator SSM non-Success poll into $.error.

Parameters.Subject: Alpha Engine Saturday Pipeline — SUCCESS
Parameters.Message: All steps completed successfully. Check dashboard for results.

NotifyComplete.Subject: Alpha Engine Backtest+Eval Pipeline — SUCCESS
NotifyComplete.Message: Mid-week backtester + evaluator rerun completed successfully. Check dashboard / the per-signal grading email for results.

HandleFailure.Comment: Failure alert via SNS — pipeline halts. Subject/Message parameterized via States.Format on $.pipeline_label (=' Backtest+Eval' from InitializeInput) so failures surface 'Alpha Engine Backtest+Eval Pipeline — FAILED'. Redrive from the failed step via the Step Functions console.

Parameters.Message.$: States.Format('Saturday{} Pipeline failed. Error: {}. Use Step Functions console to redrive from failed step.', $.pipeline_label, States.JsonToString($.error))

FailExecution.Cause: One or more pipeline steps failed. Check CloudWatch logs and redrive from the Step Functions console.
